'''ây-b-p''' ('''yabapa''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:whiddle|whiddle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| y-b-p
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:whiddle|whiddle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ây-b-p
|-
! Lemma
| yabapa
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:yabapithi|yabapithi]] || [[word:yabapiji|yabapiji]] || [[word:yabapishi|yabapishi]] || [[word:yabapi|yabapi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabaputhuth|yabaputhuth]] || [[word:yabapujuj|yabapujuj]] || [[word:yabapushush|yabapushush]] || [[word:yabap|yabap]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabaputhu|yabaputhu]] || [[word:yabapuju|yabapuju]] || [[word:yabapushu|yabapushu]] || [[word:yabapu|yabapu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabapufuth|yabapufuth]] || [[word:yabapufuj|yabapufuj]] || [[word:yabapufush|yabapufush]] || [[word:yabapuf|yabapuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:yabapethe|yabapethe]] || [[word:yabapeje|yabapeje]] || [[word:yabapeshe|yabapeshe]] || [[word:yabape|yabape]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabapothoth|yabapothoth]] || [[word:yabapojoj|yabapojoj]] || [[word:yabaposhosh|yabaposhosh]] || [[word:yabap|yabap]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabapotho|yabapotho]] || [[word:yabapojo|yabapojo]] || [[word:yabaposho|yabaposho]] || [[word:yabapo|yabapo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabapofoth|yabapofoth]] || [[word:yabapofoj|yabapofoj]] || [[word:yabapofosh|yabapofosh]] || [[word:yabapof|yabapof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:yabapĂŠthĂŠ|yabapĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:yabapĂŠjĂŠ|yabapĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:yabapĂŠshĂŠ|yabapĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:yabapĂŠ|yabapĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:yabapathath|yabapathath]] || [[word:yabapajaj|yabapajaj]] || [[word:yabapashash|yabapashash]] || [[word:yabap|yabap]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:yabapatha|yabapatha]] || [[word:yabapaja|yabapaja]] || [[word:yabapasha|yabapasha]] || [[word:yabapa|yabapa]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:yabapafath|yabapafath]] || [[word:yabapafaj|yabapafaj]] || [[word:yabapafash|yabapafash]] || [[word:yabapaf|yabapaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:yabapasha|yabapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goyabapasha|goyabapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokiyabapasha|gokiyabapasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:yabapnĂŒsha|yabapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goyabapnknĂŒsha|goyabapnknĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabapnĂŒsha|gokiyabapnĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:yabapshĂ«sha|yabapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goyabapnkshĂ«sha|goyabapnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiyabapshĂ«sha|gokiyabapshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabaprosha|yabaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabapnkrosha|goyabapnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabaprosha|gokiyabaprosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:yabapmusha|yabapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabapnkmusha|goyabapnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabapmusha|gokiyabapmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:yabapsherasha|yabapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goyabapnksherasha|goyabapnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokiyabapsherasha|gokiyabapsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:yabapngasha|yabapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goyabapnkngasha|goyabapnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokiyabapngasha|gokiyabapngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:yabapyasha|yabapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goyabapnkyasha|goyabapnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokiyabapyasha|gokiyabapyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:yabapyamasha|yabapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goyabapnkyamasha|goyabapnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokiyabapyamasha|gokiyabapyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:yabapnĂŒshĂ«sha|yabapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyabapnknĂŒshĂ«sha|goyabapnknĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyabapnĂŒshĂ«sha|gokiyabapnĂŒshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabapnĂŒrosha|yabapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabapnknĂŒrosha|goyabapnknĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabapnĂŒrosha|gokiyabapnĂŒrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabapnĂŒmusha|yabapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabapnknĂŒmusha|goyabapnknĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabapnĂŒmusha|gokiyabapnĂŒmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:yabapshĂ«nĂŒsha|yabapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyabapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha|goyabapnkshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabapshĂ«nĂŒsha|gokiyabapshĂ«nĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabapshĂ«rosha|yabapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabapnkshĂ«rosha|goyabapnkshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabapshĂ«rosha|gokiyabapshĂ«rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabapshĂ«musha|yabapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabapnkshĂ«musha|goyabapnkshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabapshĂ«musha|gokiyabapshĂ«musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:yabapronĂŒsha|yabapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyabapnkronĂŒsha|goyabapnkronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabapronĂŒsha|gokiyabapronĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:yabaproshĂ«sha|yabaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyabapnkroshĂ«sha|goyabapnkroshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyabaproshĂ«sha|gokiyabaproshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:yabapromusha|yabapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goyabapnkromusha|goyabapnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiyabapromusha|gokiyabapromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:yabapmunĂŒsha|yabapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goyabapnkmunĂŒsha|goyabapnkmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokiyabapmunĂŒsha|gokiyabapmunĂŒsha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:yabapmushĂ«sha|yabapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goyabapnkmushĂ«sha|goyabapnkmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokiyabapmushĂ«sha|gokiyabapmushĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:yabapmurosha|yabapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goyabapnkmurosha|goyabapnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokiyabapmurosha|gokiyabapmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:yabap|yabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:yĂŠbĂŠp|yĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hoyabap|hoyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hoyĂŠbĂŠp|hoyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyabap|hohoyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohoyĂŠbĂŠp|hohoyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:nĂŒyabap|nĂŒyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŒyĂŠbĂŠp|nĂŒyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyabap|nĂŒnĂŒyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠbĂŠp|nĂŒnĂŒyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:nĂŻyabap|nĂŻyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:nĂŻyĂŠbĂŠp|nĂŻyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyabap|nĂŻnĂŻyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠbĂŠp|nĂŻnĂŻyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:luyabap|luyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:luyĂŠbĂŠp|luyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyabap|luluyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luluyĂŠbĂŠp|luluyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:liyabap|liyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:liyĂŠbĂŠp|liyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyabap|liliyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liliyĂŠbĂŠp|liliyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:koyabap|koyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:koyĂŠbĂŠp|koyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyabap|kokoyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokoyĂŠbĂŠp|kokoyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:keyabap|keyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keyĂŠbĂŠp|keyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyabap|kekeyabap]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeyĂŠbĂŠp|kekeyĂŠbĂŠp]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki stative verbs]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|3a936e1}}
